evidence_summary: Establish the traveling partnership between dorothy and the_scarecrow through a physical rescue and shared goal alignment. The sequence must transition from the isolation of the cornfield edge to the movement along the yellow_brick_road.

Dorothy helps the Scarecrow down from his pole. The Scarecrow explains his desire for brains and asks Dorothy to take him to the Emerald City to see Oz. Dorothy agrees, and they set off together, with a skeptical Toto following.
From confusion to companionship and shared purpose.

dorothy, the_scarecrow, and toto are walking away down the yellow_brick_road.
Dorothy assists the Scarecrow down from his post, they form an alliance, and begin their journey.
